svg.title: Application architecture flowchart
svg.desc: Four-layer architecture: Angular frontend → Spring Boot backend → FastAPI ML service → H2/SQL database, with data flow annotations between each layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Angular frontend layer and what it does')
g.text: User interface — renders pages, forms, dashboards
Sends HTTP / REST requests to the backend

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the Spring Boot backend layer do and how does it work?')
g.text: Business logic, REST API, auth & routing
Orchestrates calls to ML service + database

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the FastAPI ML service do and how does it communicate with Spring Boot?')
sendPrompt('What is the H2 and SQL database layer and when would I switch from H2 to a production database?')
g.text: H2 = in-memory for dev · swap to PostgreSQL/MySQL in prod
